title: ExpertNote entity (ONT-E-18) — canonical provenance/source/confidence example
description: A free-form expert note that demonstrates the full provenance + source + confidence pattern (cited as the worked example in docs/README.md AI 接力开发指南). Bilingual content goes via the inherited entity.base i18n field per ADR-003 / D-12 (NOT a separate equivalent_to relation — equivalent_to is explicitly NOT used for cross-language pairs). Revisions go via the inherited entity.base version_history[] array per ADR-003 / D-07 / D-15 (NOT a has_revision relation — has_revision was internalized as a field). The author URI is distinct from provenance.actor: author = the note's intellectual author; provenance.actor = whoever entered the data into the KB. Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref. Pitfall #1 lock: unevaluatedProperties: false. Pitfall #9 lock: $schema = JSON Schema Draft 2020-12. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. Locked to 'ExpertNote' for this entity type.

author.description: URI of the Person who is the note's intellectual author. DISTINCT from provenance.actor (provenance.actor is whoever entered the data into the KB; author is the domain expert whose knowledge the note represents). Required so that downstream citations can credit the expert correctly.

content_md.description: Markdown body of the note (≥40 chars). English by default; Chinese / bilingual content lives in the inherited i18n.full_text field per ADR-003 / D-12. content_md is the pragmatic 'just write it' field for single-language notes; i18n.full_text is the formal bilingual carrier.

related_entities.description: Optional cross-references to AircraftSystem / Component / RegulationClause / Standard / etc URIs. Lightweight pointer list; formal relations go in relation YAML files.

supersedes_note.description: Optional URI to a previous ExpertNote that this one replaces. Used when the note evolves AND the entity ID changes (e.g. major topic rewrite). For in-place revisions to the same note, use the inherited entity.base version_history[] array per D-07 / D-15.
